testcase.name: Homepage — render › page title is ToolMind
Homepage — render › hero headline is visible
Homepage — render › hero subtext is visible
Homepage — render › hero right column container is present (Spline 3D wrapper)
Homepage — navigation bar › nav logo text reads ToolMind
Homepage — navigation bar › Directory nav link has href /directory
Homepage — navigation bar › Categories nav link has href /categories
Homepage — navigation bar › Compare nav link has href /compare
Homepage — navigation bar › Log in button is visible and links to /login
Homepage — navigation bar › Get started button is visible and links to /signup
Homepage — search bar interaction › search input is visible with correct placeholder
Homepage — search bar interaction › user can type in the search input
Homepage — search bar interaction › search input accepts focus without error
Homepage — search bar interaction › search input loses focus on blur
Homepage — Featured Tools section › section headline is visible
Homepage — Featured Tools section › exactly 6 tool cards are rendered
Homepage — Featured Tools section › tool card for "ChatGPT" shows name, category, and pricing
Homepage — Featured Tools section › tool card for "Midjourney" shows name, category, and pricing
Homepage — Featured Tools section › tool card for "Cursor" shows name, category, and pricing
Homepage — Featured Tools section › tool card for "Perplexity" shows name, category, and pricing
Homepage — Featured Tools section › tool card for "Notion AI" shows name, category, and pricing
Homepage — Featured Tools section › tool card for "ElevenLabs" shows name, category, and pricing
Homepage — Featured Tools section › Browse all tools CTA links to /directory
Homepage — Category section › section headline is visible
Homepage — Category section › exactly 10 category cards are rendered
Homepage — Category section › category card "Writing" links to /categories/writing
Homepage — Category section › category card "Coding" links to /categories/coding
Homepage — Category section › category card "Image" links to /categories/image
Homepage — Category section › category card "Video" links to /categories/video
Homepage — Category section › category card "Audio" links to /categories/audio
Homepage — Category section › category card "Research" links to /categories/research
Homepage — Category section › category card "Productivity" links to /categories/productivity
Homepage — Category section › category card "Data" links to /categories/data
Homepage — Category section › category card "Marketing" links to /categories/marketing
Homepage — Category section › category card "Support" links to /categories/support
Homepage — Footer › footer is visible
Homepage — Footer › footer logo links to homepage
Homepage — Footer › copyright text is present
Homepage — Footer › footer nav has 3 links: Directory, Categories, Compare
Homepage — Footer › footer Directory link has correct href
Homepage — Footer › footer Categories link has correct href
Homepage — Footer › footer Compare link has correct href
